introSection: Nopuko Air Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA. The ride previously operated at Ratanga Junction in South Africa.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Cobra opened in 1998 in Ratanga Junction in South Africa. It closed in 2018.

The ride was relocated to Lost Island Theme Park and fully constructed by October 2021. It opened at the new park in June 2022.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Blue track and purple supports. It used to feature yellow track and black supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: As the part of the move from Ratanga Junction to Lost Island Theme Park, it received new trains from Vekoma, replacing the old trains that featured bulkier restraints.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Nopuko Air Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA. The ride previously operated at Ratanga Junction in South Africa.

Cobra opened in 1998 in Ratanga Junction in South Africa. It closed in 2018.

The ride was relocated to Lost Island Theme Park and fully constructed by October 2021. It opened at the new park in June 2022.



Blue track and purple supports. It used to feature yellow track and black supports.

As the part of the move from Ratanga Junction to Lost Island Theme Park, it received new trains from Vekoma, replacing the old trains that featured bulkier restraints.


 * Ride page on the park's website
